mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month change in industrial production signals improving real output momentum and operating leverage, raising expected earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO snapshot was 103.9867 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is above 4% and CPI is still rising over 3 months, restrictive policy and persistent inflation pressure lift equity discount rates faster than nominal earnings expectations, producing negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot was 4.33 and latest CPIAUCSL snapshot was 322.132
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the interaction term between FEDFUNDS level and CPIAUCSL momentum has a nonnegative coefficient in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment greater than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals weakening labor demand and rising recession risk, causing equity investors to mark down future earnings and generating negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE snapshot was 4.2 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment increases are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if average triggered returns are not below unconditional returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales rise over 3 months while unemployment is not rising, household demand remains firm without clear labor-market stress, supporting revenue expectations and producing positive 20-day S&P 500 forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS snapshot was 726283.0 and latest UNRATE snapshot was 4.2
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger has a walk-forward hit rate below 50% for positive 20-day returns or if RSAFS strength conditional on non-rising UNRATE does not outperform RSAFS strength alone.

mechanism_narrative: A housing starts decline greater than 10% over 12 months signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction-related income softness, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST snapshot was 1321.0 as of two months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines greater than 10% year over year are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered cases or if triggered mean returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth above 100 thousand over one month combined with unemployment below 4.5% indicates ongoing labor income support without obvious recession stress, raising near-term consumption expectations and producing positive 5-day S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS snapshot was 159539 and latest UNRATE snapshot was 4.2
failure_condition: Reject if the payroll-and-unemployment joint trigger has a positive 5-day return hit rate below 50% or if its average return is not higher than periods with PAYEMS growth below 100 thousand.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI declines over 3 months while the federal funds rate is unchanged or lower, disinflation increases the probability of future easing and lowers real discount-rate pressure, producing positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered disinflation-policy-pause observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 52% of cases or if conditional returns do not exceed unconditional returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A positive quarterly change in real GDP with industrial production also rising confirms broad demand and production expansion, improving aggregate earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly change > 0 and INDPRO 3-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest GDPC1 snapshot was 23685.287 and latest INDPRO snapshot was 103.9867
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDPC1 and INDPRO expansion trigger has a 60-day positive return hit rate below 50% or if it fails to outperform periods when either series is contracting.
